description: You are the expedition meteorologist for an upcoming 8000m Himalayan summit attempt. Using the briefing document at ~/Desktop/expedition_brief.txt, analyze the NCEP surface precipitation rate (~/PanoplyData/prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc) and surface air temperature (~/PanoplyData/air.mon.ltm.nc) datasets in NASA Panoply. Restrict the plot bounds to the Himalayan region (Lat 20N to 40N, Lon 70E to 95E). Export a May precipitation plot to ~/Documents/Expedition/himalaya_precip_may.png, a July precipitation plot to ~/Documents/Expedition/himalaya_precip_july.png, and a May air temperature plot to ~/Documents/Expedition/himalaya_temp_may.png. Document the preferred summit month and the primary seasonal hazard in a report at ~/Documents/Expedition/summit_report.txt.
